sent_simp: 这个地区历史上出现过几个有名的大族。
sent_trad: 這個地區歷史上出現過幾個有名的大族。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū lìshǐ shàng chūxiànguò jǐ gè yǒumíng de dàzú.
english: Historically, this region was home to several well-known prominent clans.

sent_simp: 这位立法委员提案要修改劳工法。
sent_trad: 這位立法委員提案要修改勞工法。
pinyin: Zhè wèi lìfǎ wěiyuán tí'àn yào xiūgǎi láogōng fǎ.
english: This Legislative Yuan member has proposed amendments to labor law.
